codeReview.summary: Current HEAD fixes the original compare regression by stubbing DeFiLlama calls in `tests/compare-coingecko.test.ts`, and `tests/app.test.ts` now proves live-expanded network/dex/pool catalog behavior plus seeded fallback from current HEAD. However, the feature requirement was to remove any remaining timeout masking from compare coverage, and the compare summary test still carries a hard-coded 15000ms timeout from the earlier failed feature rather than running under default expectations.

issues.description: The feature explicitly required removing any remaining timeout-padding from `tests/compare-coingecko.test.ts`, but the endpoint-coverage summary test still ends with `}, 15000);`. Even though the DeFiLlama stubs are the real fix, this lingering custom timeout means timeout masking has not actually been removed from the compare suite as requested.

summary: Fail. The live onchain catalog behavior is now convincingly proven from current HEAD by direct app tests and no longer depends on the old misattributed commit, and the compare regression has a real stubbing-based fix. But the feature's central acceptance criterion was to remove remaining timeout masking from `tests/compare-coingecko.test.ts`, and the file still retains a 15000ms per-test timeout on the compare summary case.
